readings.title: Reset your rhythm
readings.text: A clean start helps you organize emotions and goals. Keep plans realistic and move in small focused steps.

readings.title: Speak with precision
readings.text: Conversations carry extra impact today. Be direct, calm, and selective with commitments.

readings.title: Magnetic momentum
readings.text: You attract support when your intent is clear. Keep attention on what truly moves your week forward.

readings.title: Build with patience
readings.text: Progress is solid but gradual. Consistency beats intensity right now.

readings.title: Refine your direction
readings.text: Trim what is draining your attention and double down on your strongest priority.

readings.title: Moon opposition your Jupiter
readings.text: Big feelings meet big expectations. Keep your choices balanced and avoid impulsive reactions.

readings.title: Gentle confidence
readings.text: The pace supports thoughtful action. Progress comes from clear communication and calm discipline.

readings.title: Stay centered
readings.text: Pressure can rise in close relationships. Keep boundaries clear and responses measured.

readings.title: Quiet realignment
readings.text: A lower-noise day helps you reset your priorities and simplify next steps.

readings.title: Forward with clarity
readings.text: You are ready to move from planning into action. Keep it practical and intentional.
